name: ultralytics-thop

metadata.name: ultralytics-thop
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU Affero General Public License v3 or later (AGPLv3+)
metadata.summary: Ultralytics THOP package for fast computation of PyTorch model FLOPs and parameters.

documentation:
# 🚀 THOP: PyTorch-OpCounter Welcome to the [THOP](https://github.com/ultralytics/thop) repository, your comprehensive solution for profiling PyTorch models by computing the number of Multiply-Accumulate Operations (MACs) and parameters. This tool is essential for deep learning practitioners to evaluate model efficiency and performance. [![GitHub Actions](https://github.com/ultralytics/thop/actions/workflows/format.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/ultralytics/thop/actions/workflows/main.yml) ## 📄 Description THOP offers an intuitive API to profile PyTorch models by calculating the number of MACs and parameters. This functionality is crucial for assessing the computational efficiency and memory footprint of deep learning models. ## 📦 Installation You can install THOP via pip: [![PyPI - Version](https://img.shields.io/pypi/v/ultralytics-thop?logo=pypi&logoColor=white)](https://pypi.org/project/ultralytics-thop/) [![Downloads](https://static.pepy.tech/badge/ultralytics-thop)](https://www.pepy.tech/projects/ultralytics-thop) [![PyPI - Python Version](https://img.shields.io/pypi/pyversions/ultralytics-thop?logo=python&logoColor=gold)](https://pypi.org/project/ultralytics-thop/) ```bash pip install ultralytics-thop ``` Alternatively, install the latest version directly from GitHub: ```bash pip install --upgrade git+https://github.com/ultralytics/thop.git ``` ## 🛠 How to Use ### Basic Usage To profile a model, you can use the following example: ```python import torch from torchvision.models import resnet50 from thop import profile model = resnet50() input = torch.randn(1, 3, 224, 224) macs, params = profile(model, inputs=(input,)) ``` ### Define Custom Rules for Third-Party Modules You can define custom rules for unsupported modules: ```python import torch.nn as nn class YourModule(nn.Module): # your definition pass def count_your_model(model, x, y): # your rule here pass input = torch.randn(1, 3, 224, 224) macs, params = profile(model, inputs=(input,), custom_ops={YourModule: count_your_model}) ``` ### Improve Output Readability Use `thop.clever_format` for a more readable output: ```python from thop import clever_format macs, params = clever_format([macs, params], "%.3f") ``` ## 📊 Results of Recent Models The following table presents the parameters and MACs for popular models. These results can be reproduced using the script `benchmark/evaluate_famous_models.py`.
| Model | Params(M) | MACs(G) | | ---------------- | --------- | ------- | | alexnet | 61.10 | 0.77 | | vgg11 | 132.86 | 7.74 | | vgg11_bn | 132.87 | 7.77 | | vgg13 | 133.05 | 11.44 | | vgg13_bn | 133.05 | 11.49 | | vgg16 | 138.36 | 15.61 | | vgg16_bn | 138.37 | 15.66 | | vgg19 | 143.67 | 19.77 | | vgg19_bn | 143.68 | 19.83 | | resnet18 | 11.69 | 1.82 | | resnet34 | 21.80 | 3.68 | | resnet50 | 25.56 | 4.14 | | resnet101 | 44.55 | 7.87 | | resnet152 | 60.19 | 11.61 | | wide_resnet101_2 | 126.89 | 22.84 | | wide_resnet50_2 | 68.88 | 11.46 | | Model | Params(M) | MACs(G) | | ------------------ | --------- | ------- | | resnext50_32x4d | 25.03 | 4.29 | | resnext101_32x8d | 88.79 | 16.54 | | densenet121 | 7.98 | 2.90 | | densenet161 | 28.68 | 7.85 | | densenet169 | 14.15 | 3.44 | | densenet201 | 20.01 | 4.39 | | squeezenet1_0 | 1.25 | 0.82 | | squeezenet1_1 | 1.24 | 0.35 | | mnasnet0_5 | 2.22 | 0.14 | | mnasnet0_75 | 3.17 | 0.24 | | mnasnet1_0 | 4.38 | 0.34 | | mnasnet1_3 | 6.28 | 0.53 | | mobilenet_v2 | 3.50 | 0.33 | | shufflenet_v2_x0_5 | 1.37 | 0.05 | | shufflenet_v2_x1_0 | 2.28 | 0.15 | | shufflenet_v2_x1_5 | 3.50 | 0.31 | | shufflenet_v2_x2_0 | 7.39 | 0.60 | | inception_v3 | 27.16 | 5.75 |
## 💡 Contribute We welcome community contributions to enhance THOP. Please check our [Contributing Guide](https://docs.ultralytics.com/help/contributing/) for more details. Your feedback and suggestions are highly appreciated! ## 📄 License THOP is licensed under the AGPL-3.0 License. For more information, see the [LICENSE](https://github.com/ultralytics/thop/blob/main/LICENSE) file. ## 📮 Contact For bugs or feature requests, please open an issue on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/ultralytics/thop/pulls). Join our community on [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/ultralytics) for discussions and support.

functions.name: thop.utils.colorful_print
documentation: A decorator to print text in the specified terminal color by wrapping the given print function.

functions.name: thop.utils.clever_format
documentation: Formats numbers into human-readable strings with units (K for thousand, M for million, etc.).

functions.name: thop.fx_profile.count_clamp
documentation: Ensures tensor array sizes are appropriate by clamping specified input and output shapes.

functions.name: thop.fx_profile.count_mul
documentation: Returns the number of elements in the first output shape.

functions.name: thop.fx_profile.count_matmul
documentation: Calculates matrix multiplication ops based on input and output tensor shapes for performance profiling.

functions.name: thop.fx_profile.count_fn_linear
documentation: Calculates the total FLOPs for a linear layer, including bias operations if specified.

functions.name: thop.fx_profile.count_fn_conv2d
documentation:
Calculates total operations (FLOPs) for a 2D conv layer based on input and output shapes using
`calculate_conv`.

functions.name: thop.fx_profile.count_nn_linear
documentation: Counts the FLOPs for a fully connected (linear) layer in a neural network module.

functions.name: thop.fx_profile.count_zero_ops
documentation: Returns 0 for a neural network module, input shapes, and output shapes in PyTorch.

functions.name: thop.fx_profile.count_nn_conv2d
documentation: Calculates FLOPs for a 2D Conv2D layer in an nn.Module using input and output shapes.

functions.name: thop.fx_profile.count_nn_bn2d
documentation: Calculate FLOPs for an nn.BatchNorm2d layer based on the given output shape.

functions.name: thop.fx_profile.null_print
documentation: A no-op print function that takes any arguments without performing any actions.

functions.name: thop.fx_profile.fx_profile
documentation: Profiles nn.Module for total FLOPs per operation and prints detailed nodes if verbose.

methods.name: thop.fx_profile.MyOP.forward
documentation: Performs forward pass on given input data.

methods.name: thop.fx_profile.MyModule.__init__
documentation: Initializes MyModule with two linear layers and a custom MyOP operator.

methods.name: thop.fx_profile.MyModule.forward
documentation:
Applies two linear transformations to the input tensor, clamps the second, then combines and processes
with MyOP operator.

functions.name: thop.profile.profile_origin
documentation: Profiles a PyTorch model's operations and parameters, applying either custom or default hooks.

functions.name: thop.profile.profile
documentation: Profiles a PyTorch model, returning total operations, parameters, and optionally layer-wise details.

functions.name: thop.vision.basic_hooks.count_parameters
documentation: Calculate and return the total number of learnable parameters in a given PyTorch model.

functions.name: thop.vision.basic_hooks.zero_ops
documentation: Incrementally add zero operations to the model's total operations count.

functions.name: thop.vision.basic_hooks.count_convNd
documentation: Calculate and add the number of convolutional operations (FLOPs) for a ConvNd layer to the model's total ops.

functions.name: thop.vision.basic_hooks.count_convNd_ver2
documentation: Calculates and updates total operations (FLOPs) for a convolutional layer in a PyTorch model.

functions.name: thop.vision.basic_hooks.count_normalization
documentation: Calculate and add the FLOPs for a batch normalization layer, including elementwise and affine operations.

functions.name: thop.vision.basic_hooks.count_prelu
documentation: Calculate and update the total operation counts for a PReLU layer using input element number.
def count_layer_norm(m, x, y):
m.total_ops += calculate_norm(x.numel())
def count_instance_norm(m, x, y):
m.total_ops += calculate_norm(x.numel())

functions.name: thop.vision.basic_hooks.count_relu
documentation: Calculate and update the total operation counts for a ReLU layer.

functions.name: thop.vision.basic_hooks.count_softmax
documentation: Calculate and update the total operation counts for a Softmax layer in a PyTorch model.

functions.name: thop.vision.basic_hooks.count_avgpool
documentation: Calculate and update the total number of operations (FLOPs) for an AvgPool layer based on the output elements.

functions.name: thop.vision.basic_hooks.count_adap_avgpool
documentation: Calculate and update the total operation counts for an AdaptiveAvgPool layer using kernel and element counts.

functions.name: thop.vision.basic_hooks.count_upsample
documentation: Update total operations counter for upsampling layers based on the mode used.
TODO: verify the accuracy

functions.name: thop.vision.basic_hooks.count_linear
documentation: Counts total operations for nn.Linear layers using input and output element dimensions.
nn.Linear

functions.name: thop.vision.calc_func.l_prod
documentation: Compute the product of all elements in the input list.

functions.name: thop.vision.calc_func.l_sum
documentation: Calculate the sum of all numerical elements in a list.

functions.name: thop.vision.calc_func.calculate_parameters
documentation: Calculate the total number of parameters in a list of tensors using the product of their shapes.

functions.name: thop.vision.calc_func.calculate_zero_ops
documentation: Initializes and returns a tensor with all elements set to zero.

functions.name: thop.vision.calc_func.calculate_conv2d_flops
documentation: Calculate FLOPs for a Conv2D layer using input/output sizes, kernel size, groups, and the bias flag.

functions.name: thop.vision.calc_func.calculate_conv
documentation: Calculate FLOPs for convolutional layers given bias, kernel size, output size, in_channels, and groups.

functions.name: thop.vision.calc_func.calculate_norm
documentation: Compute the L2 norm of a tensor or array based on its input size.

functions.name: thop.vision.calc_func.calculate_relu_flops
documentation: Calculates the FLOPs for a ReLU activation function based on the input tensor's dimensions.

functions.name: thop.vision.calc_func.calculate_relu
documentation: Convert an input tensor to a DoubleTensor with the same value (deprecated).

functions.name: thop.vision.calc_func.calculate_softmax
documentation: Compute FLOPs for a softmax activation given batch size and feature count.

functions.name: thop.vision.calc_func.calculate_avgpool
documentation: Calculate the average pooling size for a given input tensor.

functions.name: thop.vision.calc_func.calculate_adaptive_avg
documentation: Calculate FLOPs for adaptive average pooling given kernel size and output size.

functions.name: thop.vision.calc_func.calculate_upsample
documentation: Calculate the operations required for various upsample methods based on mode and output size.

functions.name: thop.vision.calc_func.calculate_linear
documentation: Calculate the linear operation count for given input feature and number of elements.

functions.name: thop.vision.calc_func.counter_matmul
documentation: Calculate the total number of operations for matrix multiplication given input and output sizes.

functions.name: thop.vision.calc_func.counter_mul
documentation: Calculate the total number of operations for element-wise multiplication given the input size.

functions.name: thop.vision.calc_func.counter_pow
documentation: Computes the total scalar multiplications required for power operations based on input size.

functions.name: thop.vision.calc_func.counter_sqrt
documentation: Calculate the total number of scalar operations required for a square root operation given an input size.

functions.name: thop.vision.calc_func.counter_div
documentation: Calculate the total number of scalar operations for a division operation given an input size.

functions.name: thop.rnn_hooks._count_rnn_cell
documentation: Calculate the total operations for an RNN cell given input size, hidden size, and optional bias.

functions.name: thop.rnn_hooks.count_rnn_cell
documentation: Counts the total RNN cell operations based on input tensor, hidden size, bias, and batch size.

functions.name: thop.rnn_hooks._count_gru_cell
documentation: Counts the total operations for a GRU cell based on input size, hidden size, and bias configuration.

functions.name: thop.rnn_hooks.count_gru_cell
documentation: Calculates and updates the total operations for a GRU cell in a mini-batch during inference.

functions.name: thop.rnn_hooks._count_lstm_cell
documentation: Counts LSTM cell operations during inference based on input size, hidden size, and bias configuration.

functions.name: thop.rnn_hooks.count_lstm_cell
documentation: Counts and updates the total operations for an LSTM cell in a mini-batch during inference.

functions.name: thop.rnn_hooks.count_rnn
documentation: Calculate and update the total number of operations for each RNN cell in a given batch.

functions.name: thop.rnn_hooks.count_gru
documentation: Calculates total operations for a GRU layer, updating the model's operation count based on batch size.

functions.name: thop.rnn_hooks.count_lstm
documentation: Calculate total operations for LSTM layers, including bidirectional, updating model's total operations.
